title: hydrangea macrophylla subsp. chungii
intro: Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. chungii, also known as the Chinese bigleaf hydrangea, is a subspecies of the bigleaf hydrangea plant native to the mountainous regions of China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain. The health benefits of Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. chungii include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases such as arthritis and cancer. Hydrangea macrophylla subsp. chungii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
